What We Offer

Specialised Procedures & Services

From diagnostic to advanced therapeutic interventions, Ananta Gastro & Liver Hospital provides a full spectrum of gastroenterology and endoscopy services.

🔭

ERCP

Endoscopic Retrograde Cholangiopancreatography for diagnosis and treatment of bile duct, gallbladder, and pancreatic duct conditions under fluoroscopy guidance.

🩺

Upper GI Endoscopy

Diagnostic and therapeutic OGD scopy for oesophagus, stomach, and duodenum, including biopsy, polypectomy, and haemostasis.

🔎

Colonoscopy

Complete large bowel evaluation including polyp removal, biopsy, and colon cancer screening for comprehensive colorectal health.

💧

Bile Leak Management

Expert biliary interventions including bile leak management, bile duct stone extraction, and biliary stenting under fluoroscopy.

🫀

Liver Disease Management

Comprehensive hepatology care — chronic liver disease, cirrhosis, hepatitis B & C, fatty liver, and portal hypertension management.

💊

GI Consultation

Outpatient consultation for all GI conditions including GERD, peptic ulcer, IBD, IBS, pancreatitis, and acidity disorders.

About the Doctor

Precision. Experience.
Compassionate Care.

Dr. Dhruv Patel holds an MD in Internal Medicine and a DrNB (super-speciality) in Medical Gastroenterology. With hands-on expertise in therapeutic endoscopy and advanced biliary procedures, he brings specialist-level skill to every consultation and intervention at Ananta Gastro & Liver Hospital, Chandkheda.

Specialising in ERCP, bile leak management, fluoroscopy-guided biliary interventions, upper GI endoscopy, colonoscopy, and the full range of hepatogastroenterology — committed to accurate diagnosis and minimally invasive treatment, prioritising patient safety at every step.

🏥

Advanced Facility

Equipped endoscopy suite with digital fluoroscopy and modern imaging at Chandkheda

🎯

Precise Diagnosis

Combining endoscopy, imaging, and clinical expertise for accurate workup

🤝

Patient-First

Clear communication, informed consent, and personalised care plans

⚡

Emergency Ready

Available for urgent biliary, GI bleeding, and endoscopic emergencies

MD · DrNB Gastroenterology

Meet the Doctor

Dr. Dhruv Patel

Dr. Dhruv Patel is a qualified Gastroenterologist and Hepatologist with an MD in Internal Medicine and a DrNB (super-speciality) in Medical Gastroenterology. He is the founder and lead physician at Ananta Gastro & Liver Hospital, Chandkheda, Ahmedabad.

His clinical expertise covers advanced therapeutic endoscopy — including ERCP, biliary interventions, oesophageal stenting, and fluoroscopy-guided procedures — as well as comprehensive management of liver disease, hepatitis, IBD, and all GI disorders. He is known for his patient-first approach and commitment to minimally invasive care.

Conditions Treated

Common GI Conditions We Manage

Comprehensive care for the full spectrum of gastrointestinal and hepatobiliary disorders.

GERD / Acid Reflux
Peptic Ulcer Disease
Gallstones & Bile Duct Stones
Pancreatitis (Acute & Chronic)
Inflammatory Bowel Disease
Irritable Bowel Syndrome
Liver Disease & Cirrhosis
Hepatitis B & C
Colon Polyps & Cancer Screening
GI Bleeding
Bile Leaks & Biliary Strictures
Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD)
